subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of the Blessed Beauty! Your letter dated 12 August 1919 was received, and a brief reply is included herewith
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین جمال مبارک نامه ۱۵ شهر ذی قعده ۱۳۳٨ رسید مختصر جواب مرقوم میگردد
subcodes.subjects: @courtesy; culture [adab], @firmness in the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity
